description: Recommerce operates an ecommerce service focused on refurbished devices and trade-in/resale flows. Its public website markets refurbished products and device trade-in services across several regions.
summary: Recommerce exposes two public MCP server endpoints: ReCommerce at `https://mcp.recommerce.com/` and Recommerce Trade-in at `https://mcp.tradein.recommerce.com`; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs were found on `recommerce.com`.
